title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the main character in the book got a lot of
plushies too!
choice_data_list: Did I go a little overboard?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No, not at all! It's like my dream came true! I'm
really happy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And if I manage to carry all these back home
without dropping one...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Think of the effect it'll have on my core muscles!
Talk about two birds with one stone!
